docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $56.93 SERVED MAY-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT 350 ALABAMA STREET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRISTIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 350 ALABAMA STREET SEE FULLY INCORPORATED ATTACHMENT 6(A) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, CHRISTIE AS TO DEFENDANT 350 ALABAMA STREET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY LEE, CHRISTIE 350 ALABAMA STREET
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT 350 ALABAMA STREET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF CHRISTIE LEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 350 ALABAMA STREET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JASON RICHARDS HOA TREASURER. PLAINTIFF WAIVES CLAIM AMOUNT OVER $5000 AS STIPULATED BY PARTIES CC & R'S TO ALLOW THIS MATTER TO BE HEARD WITH SMALL CLAIMS JURISDICTION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
